philippines.title: City mulls calamity status for mountain barangays amid dry spell
philippines.description:
As the dry season intensifies, the city government has eyed declaring a state of calamity to support livelihoods, especially in the agriculture sector on mountainous areas in Cebu....
Keep on reading: City mulls calamity status for mountain barangays amid dry spell

philippines.title: Crimson Resort and Spa Mactan and Quest Hotel Cebu officially launch “Hello Summer” 2026 campaign
philippines.description:
Under the golden hues of Mactan’s sunset, Filinvest Hospitality officially raised the curtain on its 2026 “Hello Summer” campaign. The launch was celebrated aboard a high-energy yacht party on April 11, 2026, where the sea breeze and music set the stage for a collaboration between Crimson Resort and Spa Mactan and Quest Hotel and Conference Center Cebu. The campaign, which runs for bookings through May 31, 2026, forms part of a recurring seasonal initiative across Filinvest Hospitality properties, encouraging travelers to rediscover summer through curated leisure experiences and staycation offers. This year’s campaign was introduced during a yacht gathering along […]...
Keep on reading: Crimson Resort and Spa Mactan and Quest Hotel Cebu officially launch “Hello Summer” 2026 campaign

philippines.title: Police seize ₱15.3M drugs, net hundreds in a week
philippines.description:
Police operations across Central Visayas from April 5 to 11 resulted in hundreds of arrests and the seizure of millions worth of illegal drugs, firearms, and gambling money as authorities intensified their anti-criminality campaign in the region....
Keep on reading: Police seize ₱15.3M drugs, net hundreds in a week

energy.title: LNG Shock Hits Asia as War Disrupts Gulf Exports and Prices Soar
energy.description: Over the past month, Asia’s imports of LNG have plunged to their lowest level since the Covid pandemic crashed demand in June 2020, as the Middle East war trapped supply and pushed prices to multi-year highs. The 30-day moving average of net LNG shipments to Asia plummeted below 600,000 tons this weekend, ship-tracking data compiled by Bloomberg showed on Monday. This was the lowest one-month moving average of LNG arrivals into Asia since June 2020, according to the data. In China, surging LNG prices amid the war in the Middle East are set…

energy.title: First Iranian Tankers Reach India Since 2019 Sanctions Cutoff
energy.description: Two Iranian tankers loaded with crude oil have arrived in India, Bloomberg has reported, in what is the first shipment of Iranian crude to the subcontinent in seven years. The two carry a total of 4 million barrels of oil. The buyers have not been specified, Bloomberg noted. The shipments were made possible by a U.S. waiver on sanctions against Iran’s oil industry in a bid to alleviate an increasingly worrying shortage in global markets amid the war between the U.S. and Israel, and Iran, which prompted the latter to close off the Strait of…
